entry.menu.title: LongLive
entry.menu.body: Confirm to open compatibility settings. Cancel to view diagnostics.
panel.overview.intro: LongLive is running as a host-side library and compatibility layer. Use the left navigation to inspect status or change compatibility options.
panel.compatibility.hint: Use the bottom buttons to toggle compatibility options directly from this panel.
diagnostics.title: LongLive Diagnostics
diagnostics.local_mods_unresolved_explai: The runtime surface was found, but the game's local mod test folder could not be resolved. Usually this means the current session did not enter through the local mod test path, or Next did not expose that directory.
diagnostics.content_backend_deferred_exp: The current content backend is still Deferred. LongLive is recording and forwarding content requests, but it is not directly owning content loading yet.
diagnostics.bridge_not_reported_explaine: The Bridge side has not written its state back to Host yet. Usually this means only Host was loaded in this session, the Next Bridge mod did not participate, or its script path has not been triggered yet.
compatibility.easybatch.missing_method: EasyBatch.Plugin was detected, but Update could not be resolved.
compatibility.easybatch.redirect_install: EasyBatch.Update redirect is installed and owned by LongLive.
compatibility.easybatch.redirect_pending: EasyBatch.Plugin.Update is available, but the LongLive redirect did not finish installing.
compatibility.easybatch.source_missing: EasyBatch.Plugin was not detected in the current host runtime.
compatibility.whiteze.registered_present: WhiteZe-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, and the reference WhiteZe runtime surface is present.
compatibility.whiteze.registered_missing: WhiteZe-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, but the reference WhiteZe runtime surface was not detected in the current host.
compatibility.whiteze.next_unavailable: WhiteZe-style Next routing/query adapters were skipped because Next runtime command/query registration is unavailable.
compatibility.vtools.registered_present: VTools-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, and the reference VTools runtime surface is present.
compatibility.vtools.registered_missing: VTools-style Next routing/query adapters were registered, but the reference VTools runtime surface was not detected in the current host.
compatibility.vtools.next_unavailable: VTools-style Next routing/query adapters were skipped because Next runtime command/query registration is unavailable.
compatibility.menu.title: Compatibility Settings
compatibility.menu.summary: Toggle compatibility features below. Alias-based compatibility changes apply immediately. EasyBatch redirect changes take effect on the next intercepted update.
compatibility.menu.toggle_hint: Click the LongLive entry again after changing values to refresh this panel.
compatibility.menu.step_easybatch: Confirm to toggle EasyBatch compatibility. Cancel to keep it unchanged and continue.
compatibility.menu.step_whiteze: Confirm to toggle WhiteZe Tools compatibility. Cancel to keep it unchanged and continue.
compatibility.menu.step_vtools: Confirm to toggle VTools compatibility. Cancel to finish without changing it.
bridge.host_missing_tip: LongLive Host is missing. Install LongLive Host into BepInEx/plugins.
bridge.host_incompatible_tip: LongLive Host is installed, but this Bridge needs a newer compatible Host build.
